StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.part ON l_partkey = p_partkey WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#13' AND p_container = 'MED CAN' AND l_quantity < (SELECT 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity) AS l_avg FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem li WHERE l_partkey = p_partkey)

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [globalagg1018]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1020] END
CASE WHEN [Expr1055]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [Expr1056]/CONVERT_IMPLICIT(decimal(19,0),[Expr1055],0) END
